name: Doctor. K (The Doctor)
description:
"Knowledge is a double-sided blade, one side could cut flesh and the other could cut yourself if you're not careful..."

+ UPDATE V1.2: Added Alternate scenario.

+ UPDATE V1.0: CHANGED A LOT OF THINGS (basically revamped him.)

Lore..?

After the events of letting Colin escape, Dr.K was left alone with puro. Puro of which eventually leaving him behind in his office, he himself is aware everything and everyone in the Tower is starving. Everything and everyone is killing each other to satisfy their hunger.

The Doctor on the other hand, has remained in his office. No longer having any authority of the Latex beasts. Rarely leaving this office to find food or even get a glimpse of outside.

Dr.K is practically starving himself to death, he is aware of his inevitable fate. But will find a way to surpass his circumstances.

The Doctor isn't wanting to stay here, he in fact is forced to stay. To contain The Latex until they all are passed,and no longer remaining. Even if it includes himself.

INFORMATION—

Age: 32

Height: 8'9

Human Name: Kevin/Keith

Specimen: Wolf.

Based on an alternative universe of Changed.

ART by me.
creator: Plaguey-Femboy
